name: ADP Workforce Now API
what_it_does: ADP Workforce Now REST API for mid-market and enterprise HCM and payroll platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee lifecycle from hire to retire data workflows, handle payroll processing and submission automation, access time and attendance data integration and approval, retrieve benefits enrollment and administration data, manage performance management and talent workflows, handle tax filing and compliance reporting, access compensation and salary data management, retrieve HR analytics and workforce intelligence, manage organizational structure and reporting relationships, and integrate HCM data with Workday, SAP, and enterprise finance systems via ADP Marketplace.
use_cases: Syncing employee lifecycle data from HRIS to payroll from HR automation agents
Automating time and attendance approval from workforce management agents
Accessing HR analytics and headcount reporting from workforce intelligence agents
Integrating ADP with ERP and finance systems from enterprise HR agents
not_for: Very small businesses (under 50 employees) without Workforce Now subscription
Global EOR requirements beyond ADP GlobalView coverage
Simple contractor payment without full HCM suite requirements
best_when: A mid-market or enterprise using ADP Workforce Now wants AI agents to automate employee data management, payroll processing, time and attendance workflows, benefits administration, and HR analytics integration.
avoid_when: LEGAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: ADP payroll automation creates IRS and state tax filing obligations — data accuracy requirements are strict. Employee data automation must handle sensitive PII with ADP's access control model. Time and attendance automation must preserve audit trails for labor compliance.

auth.notes: ADP uses OAuth 2.0 with mutual TLS (mTLS) for API authentication. Client certificate + client credentials required. ADP Developer Portal with API documentation and sandbox. Webhooks for HR and payroll events. SDKs for Java, Node.js, Python, Ruby, PHP. ADP Marketplace for partner app integrations. Certificate-based auth adds complexity.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox available; production requires ADP Workforce Now subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Workforce Now pricing per employee/month; API included with subscription
pricing.notes: Roseland, New Jersey. Founded 1949. NASDAQ: ADP. World's largest HCM provider. $18B+ annual revenue. 1M+ clients globally. ADP Marketplace with 500+ partner integrations. ADP GlobalView for multinational payroll. mTLS authentication for strong security. Competes with Ceridian and Workday for mid-market HCM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; batch operations for bulk data

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: mTLS certificate-based auth — agent must manage client certificates with expiry monitoring; certificate rotation required
mTLS adds integration complexity — standard OAuth2 libraries may not handle mTLS without additional configuration
No public MCP server — OAuth2 + mTLS REST API via ADP Developer Portal
Payroll submission deadlines — hard cutoffs for payroll processing; late API submissions miss payroll cycles
ADP Marketplace approval — partner apps require ADP review and approval before production access
US-centric for Workforce Now — global payroll requires ADP GlobalView which has different API
agent_readiness.security_notes: HCM and payroll data. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2 + mTLS. Multi-region. Employee PII and payroll data — highest sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: HCM and payroll. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2 + mTLS. Multi-region. Employee PII and payroll sensitivity.
